ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sport was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sport was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the event belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was last updated */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, live, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the player plays */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highlights" (
  "highlight_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each highlight */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the highlight */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or upvote count of the highlight */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the video content of the highlight */,
  "created_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the highlight was created */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the highlight */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the highlight belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the highlight is from */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player featured in the highlight */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., dunk, three-pointer, touchdown) */,
  "highlight_length" INTEGER /* Length of the highlight in seconds */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the highlight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the highlight was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the highlight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highlights_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highlights_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highlights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "highlight_id" TEXT /* Reference to the highlight the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_highlight_id FOREIGN KEY ("highlight_id") REFERENCES highlights ("highlight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highlight_tags" (
  "highlight_id" TEXT /* Reference to the highlight */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the highlight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the highlight tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the highlight tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id", "tag")
)
